creator: znerd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Kees Jan,

> http://www.kjkoster.org/download/mysql-jdbc-mm.diff

Some comments on the actual patch:

1) Please use the unified diff format (diff -u). It's easier to read through.
2) PORTREVISION=1? PORTREVISION should only be bumped if the PORTVERSION 
stays the same, but the contents for the port have changed, so that a 
portupgrade would install an improved version of the application.
3) Perhaps we should rename mm.mysql-2.0.7-bin.jar to mm.mysql-2.0.7.jar? The 
-bin postfix is not really useful, is it?

In general the changes to the port look very nice indeed.

Ernst

-- 
Ernst de Haan
EuroNet Internet B.V.

    "Come to me all who are weary and burdened
        and I will give you rest" -- Jesus Christ
